_doc.title: Exhaustive Kṛt Pratyaya Catalog — Panini Engine v3
_doc.legacy_stub_note: Earlier file had a duplicate mini-stub of GaY/tfc/Nvul/tavyat/kta/ktavatu/SatR; full entries appear below under the same keys.
_doc.encoding: SLP1 throughout. Devanāgarī in *_devanagari fields only.

key_conventions.upadesha_slp1: Full upadeśa form including all it-varṇas (SLP1).
key_conventions.prakriya_base_slp1: Form after all it-lopa (= what the engine works with).
key_conventions.it_varna_slp1: List of it-varṇa characters in upadeśa (SLP1 chars).
key_conventions.iT_behavior: set=seṭ(always iṭ), anit=never iṭ, vet=optional, na=not applicable(vowel-initial).
key_conventions.vidhana_sutra: The sūtra that enjoins this pratyaya.
key_conventions.vidhana_sutra_range: If a range covers this pratyaya (anuvṛtti scope).
key_conventions.lopa_by: 1.3.9 fires lopa on it-varṇas. Listed for trace.
key_conventions.guna_vrddhi_trigger: Which it-flag triggers guṇa or vṛddhi.

SLP1_it_flag_key.Y: Yit (ñit) → 7.2.115 vṛddhi of aṅga; also ātmanepada by 1.3.12
SLP1_it_flag_key.n: nit → 7.3.83 no guṇa when n-it ārdhadhātuka pratyaya

_doc.json_fix: 2026-04-22: single root object; unique _section_* keys (no duplicate Unicode dividers)

tavyat.accent_rule: 6.1.185 titsvaritam — first vowel of pratyaya gets svarita
tavyat.special_interactions: iṭ added by 7.2.35 for seṭ dhātus; for anit dhātus iṭ blocked by 7.2.10.
tavyat.effects: tit → svarita accent (6.1.185). kṛtya → karmaṇi/bhāve prayoga (3.4.69–3.4.70).

tavya.accent_rule: udātta on last vowel of aṅga (6.1.223)
tavya.special_interactions: Identical base to tavyat; distinguished only by accent. Often treated as one pratyaya in practice.
tavya.effects: No tit accent marker. kṛtya semantics same as tavyat.

anIyar.guna_vrddhi_trigger: guṇa by 7.3.84 (ārdhadhātuka); BUT pratyaya begins with vowel 'a' → 7.2.35 iṭ NOT applicable (not val-ādi)
anIyar.accent_rule: rit → ātmanepada tendency; accent on first vowel of pratyaya
anIyar.iT_note: Starts with 'a' (vowel) → 7.2.35 (ārdhadhātukasyeḍ valādeḥ) does NOT apply. No iṭ ever.
anIyar.special_interactions: No iṭ (vowel-initial). guṇa of dhātu by 7.3.84. rit → potential ātmanepada marker in some forms.
anIyar.effects: Vowel-initial pratyaya — iṭ never added. rit-it flag. kṛtya semantics.

yat.guna_vrddhi_trigger: guṇa by 7.3.84 if applicable; but many dhātus take no guṇa before yat
yat.iT_note: yat starts with 'y' (ya-kāra), which is a semi-vowel. 7.2.35 iṭ not applicable (y ∉ VAL set).
yat.special_interactions: dhātu must end in ac (vowel) per 3.1.97. Many exceptions in 3.1.98–3.1.123.
yat.effects: tit → svarita (6.1.185). Vowel-final dhātus only. kṛtya semantics.

kyap.guna_vrddhi_trigger: kit → no guṇa/vṛddhi (1.1.5 क्ङिति च). pit → parasmaipada optionally.
kyap.special_interactions: kit prevents guṇa/vṛddhi. pit → parasmaipada. samprasāraṇa possible.
kyap.effects: kit blocks guṇa/vṛddhi (1.1.5). pit (ātmanepada/parasmaipada niyama). kṛtya semantics.

Ryat.artha_dev: आर्हे — ऋकारान्त या हलन्त धातुओं से
Ryat.iT_note: y-initial pratyaya → 7.2.35 not applicable. Rit causes vṛddhi instead of guṇa.
Ryat.special_interactions: Rit triggers vṛddhi (7.2.115) not guṇa (7.3.84). tit accent. Often replaces yat for consonant-final dhātus.
Ryat.effects: Rit → vṛddhi (7.2.115). tit → svarita (6.1.185). kṛtya semantics.

iT_detail.anit_dhatus: iṭ blocked (7.2.10): e.g. ci → cetA, nI → netA
iT_detail.condition_sutra: 7.2.10 ekāc upadeśeḥ anudāttāt blocks iṭ for anit ekāc dhātus

tfc.anaN_dev: ऋदुशनस्पुरुदंसोऽनेहसां च — ṛkārānta aṅga gets anaṅ before su (sarvanamasthāna)
tfc.upadha_dirgha_dev: अप्तृन्तृच्स्वसृ॰ — upadhā lengthened before sarvanamasthāna su
tfc.accent_rule: 6.1.163 cit → antodata (last vowel of whole word gets udātta)
tfc.stem_type: ṛ-anta (oblique: cetṛ-, nom.sg.: cetā after n-lopa)
tfc.effects: cit → antodata accent (6.1.163). guṇa by 7.3.84. iṭ: veṭ (set/anit by dhātu). Produces agent nouns with ṛ-declension.

iT_detail.anit_dhatus: iṭ blocked by 7.2.10 for ekāc anit

Nvul.adesha_process: Nvul → [N=it by 1.3.7; l=it by 1.3.3; lopa by 1.3.9] → vu → [7.1.1 yuvor anākau] → aka
Nvul.special_interactions: vu → aka (7.1.1). Rit triggers vṛddhi (7.2.115) not guṇa. Final stem = dhātu + vṛddhi + aka.
Nvul.effects: Rit → vṛddhi (7.2.115). vu→aka (7.1.1). Produces -aka agent nouns.

Rini.dhatu_condition_dev: विशिष्ट प्रसंगों में सर्व धातुओं से
Rini.special_interactions: Rit causes vṛddhi. idit causes nuṃ in some derivatives. in-anta declension.
Rini.effects: Rit → vṛddhi (7.2.115). idit → nuṃ-āgama (7.1.58) for feminine. ātmanepadinaḥ by 1.3.12 possible.

Satf~.accent_rule: svarita on at's vowel by ṛt-class
Satf~.vikarana_note: Śit → sārvādhātuka → vikaraṇa (śap/śyan/śnu etc.) required between dhātu and pratyaya
Satf~.special_interactions: Śit → sārvādhātuka. ṛdit → nuṃ in feminine (7.1.80). Requires vikaraṇa (śap etc.).
Satf~.effects: Śit → sārvādhātuka samjñā (3.4.113). ṛdit → nuṃ for feminine. Present participle (parasmaipada).

SAnac.special_interactions: Śit → sārvādhātuka. cit → antodata. ātmanepada partner to śatṛ.
SAnac.effects: Śit → sārvādhātuka (3.4.113). cit → antodata (6.1.163). Present participle (ātmanepada).

kvip.kvip_note: All of k, v, p are it. Remaining base = empty string. Dhātu form itself becomes the stem.
kvip.special_interactions: kit prevents guṇa/vṛddhi. The entire pratyaya disappears after lopa; dhātu = stem.
kvip.effects: kit (no guṇa), vit, pit. Zero-suffix pratyaya. dhātu form serves as stem.

qvip.guna_vrddhi_trigger: Dit → whole aṅga replaced by ādeśa (1.1.54)
qvip.effects: Dit → anekāl replacement (1.1.54). Produces compound-final nouns primarily.

GaY.guna_vrddhi_trigger: Yit (ñit) → vṛddhi by 7.2.115; Git → prevents cjoḥ ku (7.3.52)
GaY.git_effect: Git → cjoḥ ku ghinṇyatoḥ (7.3.52) does NOT apply → palatal remains palatal
GaY.dhatu_condition_dev: भाव और अकर्तृ कारक अर्थ में सर्व धातुओं से
GaY.special_interactions: Git blocks ku-substitution (7.3.52). Yit causes vṛddhi not guṇa. Most common bhāva pratyaya.
GaY.effects: Yit → vṛddhi (7.2.115). Git → no palatalization (7.3.52). Produces bhāva nouns in -a (masc.).

ap.vidhana_sutra_dev: हनः सम्प्रसारणं च — and various other sutras
ap.effects: pit. guṇa by 7.3.84. Produces bhāva/karma a-anta nouns.

lyuw.adesha_process: lyuṭ → [l=it, w=it; lopa] → yu → [7.1.1 yuvor anākau] → ana
lyuw.iT_note: wij-it (ṭit) → ṭit causes ādeśa replaces sthānin's whole form (1.1.54 if anekāl). wit blocks guṇa in some contexts.
lyuw.special_interactions: yu → ana (7.1.1). Produces -ana neuter nouns (bhāva). Most productive bhāva pratyaya.
lyuw.effects: lit, wit. yu→ana (7.1.1). guṇa (7.3.84). Produces -ana neuter bhāva nouns.

Ramu.udit_effect: udit → num-āgama option for feminine (6.4.16 type contexts)
Ramu.effects: Rit → vṛddhi (7.2.115). udit → optional nuṃ. Produces am-anta neuter bhāva nouns.

ktic.guna_vrddhi_trigger: kit → no guṇa/vṛddhi (1.1.5). cit → antodata accent.
ktic.special_interactions: kit prevents guṇa/vṛddhi. cit accent. Produces feminine -ti nouns (bhāva).
ktic.effects: kit (no guṇa/vṛddhi, 1.1.5). cit → antodata (6.1.163). Produces feminine ti-anta bhāva nouns.

ktin.note: ktic and ktin are the same base; ktic is the cit-marked variant, ktin the regular variant. Both produce -ti feminines.
ktin.effects: kit (no guṇa/vṛddhi). Produces feminine -ti bhāva/karma nouns.

iT_detail.set_dhatus: iṭ added between dhātu and ta: e.g. BU → BAvita
iT_detail.anit_dhatus: no iṭ: e.g. paca → pakta (with sandhi)

kta.kit_effect: kit → (a) no guṇa/vṛddhi (1.1.5); (b) samprasāraṇa applicable (1.2.5) for certain dhātus
kta.special_interactions: kit blocks guṇa/vṛddhi (1.1.5). iṭ optional (seṭ/anit/veṭ by dhātu). samprasāraṇa for vacanādi (1.2.5). ta → na for some dhātus (e.g. lagnaḥ).
kta.effects: kit (no guṇa/vṛddhi, 1.1.5; samprasāraṇa, 1.2.5). iṭ: veṭ. Produces past participial adjectives.

ktavatu~.udit_effect: udit → num-āgama (6.4.16 etc.) for feminine -vatī form
ktavatu~.iT_note: Same iṭ behavior as kta (shares 3.2.102 vidhāna). iṭ inserted before 'ta' portion.
ktavatu~.special_interactions: kit blocks guṇa. udit enables nuṃ-āgama for feminine. Shares iṭ with kta.
ktavatu~.effects: kit (no guṇa/vṛddhi). udit (nuṃ for feminine). Produces active past participle (kartari).

ktvA.artha_dev: पूर्वकाल — समानकर्तृक क्रियाओं में पहले हुई क्रिया के लिए
ktvA.accent_rule: avyaya — no accent marking needed in final form
ktvA.restriction: Only when the agent (kartā) of both verbs is the same
ktvA.iT_note: iṭ inserted before 'tvā' for seṭ dhātus. e.g. BU → BavitvA
ktvA.dhatu_condition_slp1: all dhātus (without upasarga → ktvā; with upasarga → lyap)
ktvA.special_interactions: kit blocks guṇa/vṛddhi. 3.4.22 lyap replaces after upasarga. Absolute construction.
ktvA.effects: kit (no guṇa/vṛddhi, 1.1.5; samprasāraṇa). Produces indeclinable gerund (absolutive).

lyap.vidhana_sutra_dev: द्विपदे स — क्त्वा ल्यप् becomes lyap after upasarga
lyap.restriction: Only after upasarga (lyap replaces ktvā per 3.4.22)
lyap.special_interactions: Replaces ktvā after upasarga. lit, pit. y-initial → no iṭ.
lyap.effects: lit, pit. guṇa by 7.3.84. Indeclinable gerund (after upasarga).

tumun.guna_vrddhi_trigger: nit → 7.3.83 (no guṇa in some contexts). guṇa by 7.3.84 generally.
tumun.nit_effect: nit → 7.3.83: aṅga does not get guṇa when nit ārdhadhātuka pratyaya follows (for specific dhātus)
tumun.iT_note: iṭ before 'tum' for seṭ dhātus. e.g. BU → BavitUm
tumun.special_interactions: nit → 7.3.83 for some dhātus. iṭ for seṭ dhātus. Infinitive function.
tumun.effects: nit (7.3.83 no guṇa for some). iṭ: veṭ. Produces the Sanskrit infinitive (tumanta).

vanip.dhatu_condition_dev: ऋत्विक् आदि गण में पठित धातुओं से
vanip.effects: vit (ādyudātta 6.1.187). pit. Produces an-anta agent nouns.

ini.effects: Vowel-initial, no iṭ. Produces in-anta agent nouns.

u.special_note: Part of uṇādi-sūtras (3.3.1). Not enumerated in Pāṇini but in uṇādi-pāṭha separately.

zkan.effects: zit, nit. Produces ka-anta bhāva nouns.

aDikaraRa_ac.effects: cit → antodata (6.1.163). guṇa (7.3.84). Produces a-anta nouns for instrument/agent.

naN.effects: Rit → vṛddhi (7.2.115). Produces na-anta bhāva nouns.

_lookup_by_prakriya_base._doc: Maps prakriya_base_slp1 → list of pratyaya IDs for dispatcher lookups.

_iT_block_condition._doc: Conditions under which 7.2.10 blocks iṭ for a given pratyaya.

7.2.10_triggers.condition: dhātu is ekāc (single vowel) AND anudātta (anit flag in JSON)
7.2.10_triggers.not_blocked_for: seṭ dhātus with udātta flag = true (e.g. BU, tF)

_samprasarana_applicable._doc: Pratyayas for which samprasāraṇa (1.2.5 ṛditaḥ and related) may apply.
